irreducible_job: Make the reader FEEL — in the author's own body, before any vocabulary exists — that a real cost can be created by one party and absorbed by another who never agreed to carry it and cannot bill it back; and seed (without naming) that this shape scales from a private life to a coal county, runs forward and backward in time, and is structural not villainous. Five load-bearing moves: (1) the felt cost-severance (NICU son + lost marriage + "we have no contact"); (2) no villain ("the system did exactly what the system was designed to do"); (3) the Coase concession pre-named ("voluntary trade-offs. I did" + "options a coal miner in McDowell County does not have"); (4) forward+backward + "the math the framework would later let me put a number on" = honest accounting; (5) lineage credit / narrow originality ("Dunbar's mask, Du Bois's veil... the pricing is new; the move is old"). Everything else is texture serving moves 1-5. The chapter's only structural defect is narrative sprawl (too many lives per page; duplicated competence-rescue set pieces), NOT conceptual premature-depth — the framework is absent on purpose.

landing_points_carried: G (human/narrative spine) — DOMINANT: son/NICU, father, grandfather, marriage loss, 'My son is somewhere in the world now... We have no contact.' The book's human anchor.

H (values/emotional arc) — STRONGEST landing: 'the most present I have ever been in my life' -> 'The house is not the thing I miss' -> 'We have no contact.' The descent is the emotional proof of the central claim.

B-seed (core claim, felt-not-named) — cost created by one party, borne by another who didn't agree and can't bill it back; delivered as lived experience, never as definition (correctly seeded per names-nothing design).
C (objection: Coase/voluntary-trades) — 'A free-market economist would say I made voluntary trade-offs. I did.' + the no-villain section (90). Clearest objection-engagement in the chapter.
A + F (lit-positioning + originality/credibility) — 'Dunbar's mask, Du Bois's veil... the pricing is new; the move is old' (116). Modest, narrow, culturally located.
O (stakes/why-now) — 'for the costs that are still ahead of us, that we still have a chance to see' (118), forward stakes without alarmism.
K (reader takeaway) — 'an honest accounting' (114), the through-question's emotional root.
landing_points_thin_or_dropped: M (domain/boundary) THIN — touched only via 'options a coal miner in McDowell County does not have'; gestures at high-option/no-option boundary but not framed as scope (acceptable for opener; boundary work belongs Ch4/Ch10).

N (concealment taxonomy/covers) THIN/IMPLICIT — the commute is a distance+time cover in disguise; no-villain is a routine/structural cover; Ch1 never labels them (correct), but they are the six-covers 'in the wild.'
D (limits), E (worked demos), J (citations), L (falsifiability), P (comps/market) — NOT ATTEMPTED, correctly; belong to analytical core + TA.
I (audience-landing) — mostly N/A (audience-blind by design); the one deliberate move is the center-right disarming 'voluntary trade-offs. I did.'
matrix_cells: Coase / free-market-environmental — CONCEDE-THEN-EXCEED (seed): concedes voluntary-trade frame in the author's own high-option case, plants the no-option McDowell comparator the book later uses to exceed Coase (Theorem P1). Ch1 does the concession; Ch9 does the exceed.

Dunbar / Du Bois (mask/veil) — EXTEND-INTO-NEW-SETTING / inherit-the-move: 'naming what hides behind a mask... is older than this book... the pricing is new; the move is old.' The book's master-move credit.

Ostrom / Desmond / Raworth (credentials-as-asset lineage) — PARALLEL (implicit): the 'work came first, the framing came later, no economics degree' posture is the Ostrom-path register, seeded not stated.

Polanyi / Fraser (structural-commons anchor) — GAP/ABSENT: the NICU/marriage/commute material is precisely Fraser's terrain (expropriation behind the wage relation) and Polanyi's (disembedding a life from its relationships); the chapter ENACTS the double-movement emotionally without naming it. Single highest-value FILL in Ch1 — one closing-section Polanyi sentence at the moment the chapter earns it emotionally.
Harvey / Mazzucato / Federici (diagnosis vs measurement) — NOT ENGAGED (correct for Ch1); only seeds 'the math the framework would later let me put a number on.'
objections_engaged: Coase / voluntary-trades — engaged head-on via the author's own case + McDowell ladder; best-handled objection in the chapter.

No-villain / 'you're just describing capitalism being mean' — pre-empted: 'My employer was not cruel... The system did exactly what the system was designed to do. There was no villain in it.' Disarms the bad-actor reading before any mechanism is named.
objections_exposed: Sandel/commodification (cost-severance-metaphor-commodifies-labor) — EXPOSED and slightly AGGRAVATED: the chapter prices a father's lost years with his son ('the math the framework would later let me put a number on'), the sharpest possible target for 'pricing the priceless launders it into a transaction.' Defense present ('not a redemption mechanism... an honest accounting') but implicit; this is the one place Ch1 should arguably do a touch more — tighten the honest-accounting-not-absolution clause.

Financialization/Pistor (bonds extend commodification) — EXPOSED (unengaged anywhere in the book, strongest unanswered hostile line per TA audit); Ch1 cannot engage (no bonds yet) so correctly deferred, but its honest-accounting/re-embedding framing is the natural seed-bed for the eventual price-to-reserve-not-sell answer.

'Numbers are invented' / unfalsifiable / overcounting — not raised; correctly deferred to the analytical core.

irreducible_job: First worked human case. Four-beat spine: (1) establish the McDowell County empirical anchor (Kennedy "wrong defendant" paradox — richest coal, poorest outcome); (2) COIN the book's load-bearing vocabulary — cost severance / severed cost / value extraction, "used in every chapter that follows"; (3) decompose the bill into priced-vs-unpriced columns (black lung, AMD/reclamation gap, community collapse, lineage brain-drain, deferred combustion tail) and hand the 33-122x magnitude claim forward to Ch 8 without computing it; (4) pre-empt the three reflexive objections (companies-evil / miners-passive / culture-not-structure via the Purdue refutation) and bridge to Ch 3. Problem is not structure but accretion: several passages do their job then keep going.

irreducible_job: Diagnosis chapter + hinge before the methodology. Four load-bearing moves: (1) cost severance is ONE structural mechanism, not six anecdotes — Libby/Deepwater/Baotou/2008/Social Security/healthcare are the same object (value extracted, costs severed onto parties who cannot refuse); (2) the gap is empirically large and conservative AND the existing legal architecture cannot reach it (Libby 40:1, Deepwater 40% recovery, SS $108T, GoFundMe 88% failure; criminal acquittal + bankruptcy + weak cross-border claims = the Pistor seam); (3) the framework answers bidirectionally with two coordinated instruments (Restitution Bond backward + Foreclosure Bond forward = CS = RCV − Bond); (4) the instruments sit inside established lineages (Coates→Darity-Mullen→Hamilton→Conley; Hartwick→reclamation→Norway→Parfit→Pettit/Skinner; Pistor). Spine lands clean at ~6–6.5K words; chapter currently runs ~12K (≈2× spine). Bloat is NOT in the case studies — it is in (a) an inline objection-rebuttal apparatus promoted from the rigor passes, (b) four bond-naming etymology essays, and (c) a paragraph-final 'same mechanism / structural finding survives' restatement tic.

irreducible_job: The universality/falsifiability chapter. Its one load-bearing job is to convert the framework from "a political critique of Earth's particular extraction arrangements" into "a general pricing instrument whose outputs change ONLY because parameters change." It does this via a falsification gambit: take the framework off Earth, run it through scenarios where the correct answer is intuitively unambiguous (Mars water = preserve; asteroid iron = extract freely; comet = extract aggressively; Europa = cannot price, wait), and show it lands the right answer in both extract and preserve directions. Spine = 4 moves: Mars-water calibration anchor → one-number-at-a-time sweep (Mars and Earth are the same system, different parameters) → cross-scenario sweep + table (bidirectional parameter-sensitivity) → objection bookend (frictionless-plane + thought-experiment + calibration-is-a-feature defenses). This is the book's home for landing-points L (falsifiability) and M (domain/boundary); anything weakening those is a TRADE not a SAFE cut.
